scripts.dark-matter:demo: npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/dark-matter-demo run demo:run
scripts.verify:mcp-parity:evm: npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && node ./scripts/verify-mcp-parity.mjs --mode matrix --rail evm-bnb
scripts.verify:mcp-parity:readonly: npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && node ./scripts/verify-mcp-parity.mjs --mode matrix --rail simulated-readonly
scripts.sdk:build: npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-sdk run build
scripts.ui:build:testnet: sh -c 'set -a && . ./.env.testnet && set +a && NODE_ENV=production npm --workspace @adm/dark-matter-ui run build'
scripts.ui:start:testnet: sh -c 'set -a && . ./.env.testnet && set +a && NODE_ENV=production npm --workspace @adm/dark-matter-ui run start'
scripts.ui:dev:testnet: sh -c 'rm -rf ./apps/dark-matter-ui/.next && set -a && . ./.env.testnet && set +a && npm --workspace @adm/dark-matter-ui run dev'
scripts.ui:dev:local: sh -c 'rm -rf ./apps/dark-matter-ui/.next && DARK_MATTER_NETWORK=anvil-local DARK_MATTER_RPC_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8545 DARK_MATTER_CHAIN_ID=31337 DARK_MATTER_LOCAL_SOURCE=state POOL_SOURCE=local AGENT_STATE_FILE=/tmp/adm-agent-state.json AGENT_LOG_FILE=/tmp/adm-agent-logs.jsonl npm --workspace @adm/dark-matter-ui run dev'
scripts.agent:start:a: npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && AGENT_A_PRIVATE_KEY=0x59c6995e998f97a5a0044966f0945389dc9e86dae88c7a8412f4603b6b78690d node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js agent --config ./agents/agent-a/config.json
scripts.agent:start:b: npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && AGENT_B_PRIVATE_KEY=0x5de4111afa1a4b94908f83103eb1f1706367c2e68ca870fc3fb9a804cdab365a node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js agent --config ./agents/agent-b/config.json
scripts.agent:start:c: npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && AGENT_C_PRIVATE_KEY=0x7c852118294e51e653712a81e05800f419141751be58f605c371e15141b007a6 node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js agent --config ./agents/agent-c/config.json
scripts.demo:up: npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && node ./scripts/demo-up.mjs
scripts.demo:chat: sh -c 'set -a && [ -f ./.env.testnet ] && . ./.env.testnet; set +a && npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && DARK_MATTER_RPC_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8545 DARK_MATTER_CHAIN_ID=31337 DARK_MATTER_NETWORK=anvil-local DARK_MATTER_DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY=0xac0974bec39a17e36ba4a6b4d238ff944bacb478cbed5efcae784d7bf4f2ff80 DARK_MATTER_AGENT_A_ADDRESS=0x70997970C51812dc3A010C7d01b50e0d17dc79C8 node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js post-task --interactive true'
scripts.agent:a:testnet: sh -c 'set -a && . ./.env.testnet && set +a && npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js agent --config ./agents/agent-a/config.testnet.json'
scripts.agent:b:testnet: sh -c 'set -a && . ./.env.testnet && set +a && npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js agent --config ./agents/agent-b/config.testnet.json'
scripts.agent:c:testnet: sh -c 'set -a && . ./.env.testnet && set +a && npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js agent --config ./agents/agent-c/config.testnet.json'
scripts.agent:d:testnet: sh -c 'set -a && . ./.env.testnet && set +a && npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js agent --config ./agents/agent-d/config.testnet.json'
scripts.demo:orchestrate:testnet: sh -c 'set -a && . ./.env.testnet && set +a && npm --workspace @adm/shared-core run build && npm --workspace @adm/agent-runtime run build && node ./apps/agent-runtime/dist/cli.js orchestrate'
